requirements.title: External-write preflight approval must require adapter capability alignment, independent human approval, concrete target binding, credential scope, budget, rollback, and stop boundaries.
requirements.acceptance_boundary: provider-execution-approval-audit passes with the corrected v8.6 blocked record and the bounded v8.7 preflight approval; read-only adapter external-write overclaim fails focused regression coverage.

forecast.estimated_token_cost_range: 0 additional implementation work items for v8.7 after final verification
forecast.forecast_boundary: Forecast is local runtime evidence and does not prove semantic truth, live provider execution, rollback execution, or market value.

not_proven: Requirement coverage proves bounded traceability only, not live provider execution safety or semantic correctness.
